title: BBNJ / High Seas Treaty Corpus
domain: Conservation and sustainable use of marine biodiversity beyond national jurisdiction (the 'High Seas Treaty') and its UNCLOS framework
coverage_note: Full corpus holds 15 instruments including the 2023 BBNJ Agreement in all six authentic UN languages. This connector ships a small English-only sample.
license_note: Compilation CC BY 4.0; source UN texts are official public documents and keep their own terms.
